message:
🌱 Disable 7 demo-only cards until wired to real backends (#2211)

Remove Contour, CRI-O, Fluentd, Flatcar, Lima, Thanos, and WasmCloud
cards from the registry, Add Card modal, metadata, and icons. These
cards only display hardcoded demo data with no real backend wiring.
They will be re-enabled once properly connected to live cluster data
with demo fallback.

Source files are preserved for future backend integration.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
